item.title: Epic Piano Instrument [Audio Apps]
item.itunes:title: Epic Piano Instrument [Audio Apps]
item.itunes:author: badcast
item.itunes:summary:
Epic Piano Instrument
(Audio Apps)
Welcome to "Epic Piano" - a virtual instrument based on the RoninEngine framework that allows you to unleash your creative potential and craft music of epic proportions. This project combines the beauty of a classical piano with cutting-edge technology to provide you with a unique musical experience.
"Epic Piano Instrument" is an inspiring musical tool crafted using the RoninEngine framework. Drawing inspiration from epic sounds and harmonies, this project empowers you to create music that can transport listeners to fantastical worlds and captivating journeys.
[read more]
item.description:
Epic Piano Instrument
(Audio Apps)
Welcome to "Epic Piano" - a virtual instrument based on the RoninEngine framework that allows you to unleash your creative potential and craft music of epic proportions. This project combines the beauty of a classical piano with cutting-edge technology to provide you with a unique musical experience.
"Epic Piano Instrument" is an inspiring musical tool crafted using the RoninEngine framework. Drawing inspiration from epic sounds and harmonies, this project empowers you to create music that can transport listeners to fantastical worlds and captivating journeys.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Epic Piano Instrument
(Audio Apps)
Welcome to "Epic Piano" - a virtual instrument based on the RoninEngine framework that allows you to unleash your creative potential and craft music of epic proportions. This project combines the beauty of a classical piano with cutting-edge technology to provide you with a unique musical experience.
"Epic Piano Instrument" is an inspiring musical tool crafted using the RoninEngine framework. Drawing inspiration from epic sounds and harmonies, this project empowers you to create music that can transport listeners to fantastical worlds and captivating journeys.
[read more]

item.title: STRP x AZURE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x AZURE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x AZURE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
🎨 Enhance Your Display!
Fine-Tune Color Calibration for a Stunning Visual Experience.

Elevate Your Device's Display Quality with AZURE! 💥

Termux Command su -c AZURE 🌈

Credits:
@raidenkk 😁
----

v1.0 Stable Release:

- Added KCAL display calibration technology for advanced color adjustment.

- Included over 60 built-in presets to cater to various preferences.

- Integrated Surface Flinger presets for brightness and saturation enhancement.

- Provided an intuitive menu system for easy access to settings and presets.

- Streamlined installation process for a seamless experience.

- Optimized battery consumption to ensure minimal impact on device performance.

- Enhanced compatibility with a wider range of devices, ensuring a consistent experience across different hardware.

- Added a "Quick Reset" option to revert to default settings instantly, providing a convenient way to troubleshoot or experiment with different configurations.

- Improved on-screen tooltips and user guidance to enhance the user experience, making it easier to understand and utilize the available features.

- Addressed minor bugs and issues, ensuring a stable and reliable release & user experience.
[read more]
item.description:
STRP x AZURE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
🎨 Enhance Your Display!
Fine-Tune Color Calibration for a Stunning Visual Experience.

- Added KCAL display calibration technology for advanced color adjustment.

- Included over 60 built-in presets to cater to various preferences.

- Integrated Surface Flinger presets for brightness and saturation enhancement.

- Provided an intuitive menu system for easy access to settings and presets.

- Streamlined installation process for a seamless experience.

- Optimized battery consumption to ensure minimal impact on device performance.

- Enhanced compatibility with a wider range of devices, ensuring a consistent experience across different hardware.

- Added a "Quick Reset" option to revert to default settings instantly, providing a convenient way to troubleshoot or experiment with different configurations.

- Improved on-screen tooltips and user guidance to enhance the user experience, making it easier to understand and utilize the available features.

- Addressed minor bugs and issues, ensuring a stable and reliable release & user experience.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
STRP x AZURE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
🎨 Enhance Your Display!
Fine-Tune Color Calibration for a Stunning Visual Experience.

Elevate Your Device's Display Quality with AZURE! 💥

Termux Command su -c AZURE 🌈

Credits:
@raidenkk 😁
----

v1.0 Stable Release:

- Added KCAL display calibration technology for advanced color adjustment.

- Included over 60 built-in presets to cater to various preferences.

- Integrated Surface Flinger presets for brightness and saturation enhancement.

- Provided an intuitive menu system for easy access to settings and presets.

- Streamlined installation process for a seamless experience.

- Optimized battery consumption to ensure minimal impact on device performance.

- Enhanced compatibility with a wider range of devices, ensuring a consistent experience across different hardware.

- Added a "Quick Reset" option to revert to default settings instantly, providing a convenient way to troubleshoot or experiment with different configurations.

- Improved on-screen tooltips and user guidance to enhance the user experience, making it easier to understand and utilize the available features.

- Addressed minor bugs and issues, ensuring a stable and reliable release & user experience.
[read more]

item.title: IAV SpeedGame [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: IAV SpeedGame [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: vallie038
item.itunes:summary:
IAV SpeedGame
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
IAV Game performance is a script shell based by adb shell, support android 11+
What IAV do :
Killing running background task
Adjusting your sensitivity
Changing renderer to opengl
Changing number buffers frame
Decreasing your lag in game
Decreasing animation into 0.0 scale
Optimazing your cpu performance
and others

1. Is IAV safe to use? The answer is yes, the script is just changing some of the properties in your system!

2. How to reset?, Well some people just restart their phone, but it's not recommend because the Operating system ( SO ) files still in the /sdcard/android so you can't just restart it

We have the reset.sh command to help you, the reboot may take too long.

-----------------------------
[ Important ] : How to execute the IAV script? The first thing you need to do is

1) Extract into archive name named "IAV-SpeedGame-1.0.2"

2) execute the script with typing "sh /storage/emulated/0/IAV-SpeedGame-1.0.2/IAV"
[read more]
item.description:
IAV SpeedGame
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
IAV Game performance is a script shell based by adb shell, support android 11+
What IAV do :
Killing running background task
Adjusting your sensitivity
Changing renderer to opengl
Changing number buffers frame
Decreasing your lag in game
Decreasing animation into 0.0 scale
Optimazing your cpu performance
and others

1. Is IAV safe to use? The answer is yes, the script is just changing some of the properties in your system!

2. How to reset?, Well some people just restart their phone, but it's not recommend because the Operating system ( SO ) files still in the /sdcard/android so you can't just restart it

We have the reset.sh command to help you, the reboot may take too long.

-----------------------------
[ Important ] : How to execute the IAV script? The first thing you need to do is

1) Extract into archive name named "IAV-SpeedGame-1.0.2"

2) execute the script with typing "sh /storage/emulated/0/IAV-SpeedGame-1.0.2/IAV"
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
IAV SpeedGame
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
IAV Game performance is a script shell based by adb shell, support android 11+
What IAV do :
Killing running background task
Adjusting your sensitivity
Changing renderer to opengl
Changing number buffers frame
Decreasing your lag in game
Decreasing animation into 0.0 scale
Optimazing your cpu performance
and others

1. Is IAV safe to use? The answer is yes, the script is just changing some of the properties in your system!

2. How to reset?, Well some people just restart their phone, but it's not recommend because the Operating system ( SO ) files still in the /sdcard/android so you can't just restart it

We have the reset.sh command to help you, the reboot may take too long.

-----------------------------
[ Important ] : How to execute the IAV script? The first thing you need to do is

1) Extract into archive name named "IAV-SpeedGame-1.0.2"

2) execute the script with typing "sh /storage/emulated/0/IAV-SpeedGame-1.0.2/IAV"
[read more]

item.title: STRPxADBLOCK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRPxADBLOCK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRPxADBLOCK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
STRP x ADBLOCK
# **v2.0 (58)**
- `ADON` will `Enable AdBlocker` and `updates host` files with support for custom hosts
- Simply use `Termux to Enable or Disable` AdBlocker no longer need to Reboot !
- Use `su -c ADON` Enable it
- Use `su -c ADOFF` Disable it
- Use `su -c ADUP` To Update the Host file or using custom host file from link.
- Example:
- `su -c ADUP`
- ! Just follow on Screen Instructions and Make sure the link begin with `https://` and also ends with `/hosts`
------
- _Minor adjustments made_
- **big thanks to @PHATWalrus for help**
[read more]
item.description:
STRPxADBLOCK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
STRP x ADBLOCK
# **v2.0 (58)**
- `ADON` will `Enable AdBlocker` and `updates host` files with support for custom hosts
- Simply use `Termux to Enable or Disable` AdBlocker no longer need to Reboot !
- Use `su -c ADON` Enable it
- Use `su -c ADOFF` Disable it
- Use `su -c ADUP` To Update the Host file or using custom host file from link.
- Example:
- `su -c ADUP`
- ! Just follow on Screen Instructions and Make sure the link begin with `https://` and also ends with `/hosts`
------
- _Minor adjustments made_
- **big thanks to @PHATWalrus for help**
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
STRPxADBLOCK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
STRP x ADBLOCK
# **v2.0 (58)**
- `ADON` will `Enable AdBlocker` and `updates host` files with support for custom hosts
- Simply use `Termux to Enable or Disable` AdBlocker no longer need to Reboot !
- Use `su -c ADON` Enable it
- Use `su -c ADOFF` Disable it
- Use `su -c ADUP` To Update the Host file or using custom host file from link.
- Example:
- `su -c ADUP`
- ! Just follow on Screen Instructions and Make sure the link begin with `https://` and also ends with `/hosts`
------
- _Minor adjustments made_
- **big thanks to @PHATWalrus for help**
[read more]

item.title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.

[read more]
item.description:
GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.

[read more]

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.

[read more]

item.title: Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: zycromerz
item.itunes:summary:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]
item.description:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]

item.title: STRP x SQLite3 [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x SQLite3 [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x SQLite3
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
- Latest SQLite 3.43.0
- Thanks to @stockrt for the convenient SQLite Builder
━━━━━━━━━━━━
SQLite Module: Supports arm64, armv7a, x86_64, and x86 Architectures
━━━━━━━━━━━━

item.title: Visiting Cards Design Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Visiting Cards Design Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulkbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Visiting Cards Design Tool
(Office Apps)
How to create best looking business cards? Visiting Cards Design Tool is downloaded from www.bulkbarcode.com website recommends stylish and easily printable staff cards using image designing objects. Business card creator tool makes fabulous visiting cards in various size and shape like rounded rectangle, rectangle and ellipse. Visiting Cards Design application helps to produce most attractive cards for your staff.

[read more]

item.title: Download Payroll Software [IoT]
item.itunes:title: Download Payroll Software [IoT]
item.itunes:author: payrollsoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Download Payroll Software
(IoT)
Powerful staff shifting scheduling program is used to keep employee records like S no, employee ID, name, department, and salary period etc for future references. Follow the company website link www.downloadpayrollsoftware.com and Download Payroll Software that is fully applicable to maintain employee attendance status, incoming/outgoing details, leave/shift details and other official records in an organized manner by using minimal numbers of resources.

[read more]

Follow the company website link www.downloadpayrollsoftware.com and Download Payroll Software that is fully applicable to maintain employee attendance status, incoming/outgoing details, leave/shift details and other official records in an organized manner by using minimal numbers of resources.

item.title: BOOTLOOP SAVER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: BOOTLOOP SAVER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
BOOTLOOP SAVER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
**BOOTLOOP SAVER by revWhiteShadow** is a revolutionary Magisk module designed to automatically disable any problematic modules causing bootloop issues on your Android device. Developed by the talented developer revWhiteShadow, this module acts as a safeguard, ensuring your device boots smoothly without being hindered by conflicting or problematic modules. It's the go-to solution for Magisk users who want a hassle-free, error-free booting experience. With BOOTLOOP SAVER, you can enjoy the benefits of Magisk modules while maintaining the stability and reliability of your Android device.

[read more]
item.description:
BOOTLOOP SAVER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
**BOOTLOOP SAVER by revWhiteShadow** is a revolutionary Magisk module designed to automatically disable any problematic modules causing bootloop issues on your Android device. Developed by the talented developer revWhiteShadow, this module acts as a safeguard, ensuring your device boots smoothly without being hindered by conflicting or problematic modules. It's the go-to solution for Magisk users who want a hassle-free, error-free booting experience. With BOOTLOOP SAVER, you can enjoy the benefits of Magisk modules while maintaining the stability and reliability of your Android device.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
BOOTLOOP SAVER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
**BOOTLOOP SAVER by revWhiteShadow** is a revolutionary Magisk module designed to automatically disable any problematic modules causing bootloop issues on your Android device. Developed by the talented developer revWhiteShadow, this module acts as a safeguard, ensuring your device boots smoothly without being hindered by conflicting or problematic modules. It's the go-to solution for Magisk users who want a hassle-free, error-free booting experience. With BOOTLOOP SAVER, you can enjoy the benefits of Magisk modules while maintaining the stability and reliability of your Android device.

[read more]
